content.en:
It didn't take long for Dongchen Dao Ancestor and more than a dozen other Supreme Nine Ancestors to come into contact with those Supreme Strength Material-level powerhouses who had cut off the forbidden area.

Dongchen Dao Ancestor and the others didn't want to fight against this group of supreme strength-level powerhouses, otherwise everyone would suffer heavy losses, but they would only cheapen those primordial antiquities in the Primordial Ancient Sea.

Therefore, what they want is peace.

At this time, Akagi spoke with the practitioners' side as a representative.

At this time, Akagi said: "Cultivators of the Silent Black Sea, we don't want to fight you when we cut off the forbidden zone, don't worry, we won't attack you, but you are not allowed to step into the cut off zone again in the future. "

When Dongchen Daozu heard this, he immediately breathed a sigh of relief.

In fact, they didn't dare to enter the Interception Forbidden Zone, and the Nine Origin Ancestors who had entered before had all been killed.

And the truncation of the forbidden area is very much suppressed on them, even if the seal is broken a little, the suppression is no longer big, but there are many strong people who cut off the forbidden area, even the strongest ninefold ancestor does not dare to enter.

So, they won't go in and risk it in the future, there's no need for that.

"Good!"

Dongchen Daozu and they agreed.

Akagi said again: "In addition, if the creatures we cut off the forbidden area leave the cut off forbidden area, they must not deliberately intercept and kill!"

"No problem!"

Dongchen Dao Ancestor, they also agreed.

Subsequently, Akagi discussed with the major forces about trading resources.

After all, some resources are of little use to these special creatures that cut off the forbidden area, but they are of great help to cultivators.

Some resources are mediocre for practitioners, but work well for these special creatures.

As a result, they can trade with each other.

In this way, the matter passed like this, and no conflict broke out between the two sides, which made it a pity for those Avatar-level Primordial Antiquities in the Silent Black Sea.

They still really want to see both sides fight, and it's better to lose both, that's great!

......

"The supreme reinforcements of the Truncated Exclusion Zone have come out of the Truncated Exclusion Zone?"

Ye Tian was a little shocked when he learned this information.

Fortunately, no conflict broke out, otherwise the cut off zone would have been shattered!

Due to the truncation of the forbidden area, the Nine Towers sent a Supreme Nine Ancestors to sit in the Xuan Tower, which can be regarded as staring at the cutting off of the forbidden area.

And this Supreme Ninefold Ancestor who arrived was Dongchen Dao Ancestor.

With Dongchen Dao Ancestor here, at least the Dao Ancestors who cut off the Xuanlou will be much more at ease, otherwise there is such a terrifying and powerful truncation forbidden area around them, and anyone will be afraid and worried!

Meanwhile.

Those supreme strength-level powerhouses who had cut off the forbidden area had all gathered together and were also discussing the future.

Akagi, Golden Mountain, Blood Desolation, and other enhancement levels have all come out, and Akagi's strength can vaguely rank among the top few.

Of course, the most powerful ones in the forbidden area are the soul elder and the jellyfish.

However, due to his strength being too strong, and being suppressed by the Truncated Forbidden Zone for some special reasons, the Soul Elder had very little time to be free, so he simply slept in the Truncated Source Sea.

And the jellyfish is due to racial reasons, plus cultivation, so the temperament is very tyrannical, and only the soul can suppress the other party.

Therefore, this time's plan did not let the jellyfish preside, otherwise there would definitely be problems.

Now that the plan is complete and the seal has been broken, they will have a lot fewer restrictions in the future, and they can even leave the forbidden area at a critical moment, so as to avoid being sealed.

At this moment, the soul elder also came out and presided over this meeting.

As soon as the soul elder appeared, he spoke: "Although the interception of the forbidden area has broken a little seal, we still don't want to provoke the enemy at the moment, so we don't want to break out into conflict with the Silent Black Sea and the Primordial Ancient Sea. Although everyone usually has some conflicts, I hope that we will unite with each other in the future, otherwise if we are attacked by external forces one by one in the future, the end of the forbidden area will come!

"Why not completely destroy and cut off Montenegro?"

Blood Hunger asked.

In fact, before cooperating with the Nine Wings Tribe, Soul Elder had awakened once, and although he agreed to the plan, he demanded that he not completely destroy and cut off Black Mountain.

But what the specific reason is, they don't know.

However, the Soul Elder is the most powerful supreme enhancement level in the Forbidden Zone, and it is also the oldest existence.

Soul Lao said: "I can't say the specific reason, but once the black mountain is completely destroyed, there will be a catastrophe, and we will all be at risk of falling!"

Akagi and the others all knew that the soul elder would not joke, so they nodded again and again that they would not destroy the Truncated Black Mountain.

In fact, it is also difficult for them to destroy the truncated Montenegro.

After all, they cooperated with the Nine Wings Tribe to break a little seal, and the entire Truncated Black Mountain is part of the seal, and it is too difficult to destroy the entire Truncated Black Mountain!

In the years that followed, one by one, the forbidden area was cut off and the reinforcement level began to develop its own race.

As the seal of the Cut-off Zone was broken a little, the rules for Cut-off Off-Zone were also changed, and the number of races in the Cut-off Zone began to increase.

At this time, Ye Tian was low-key and hidden, and he didn't practice like before, otherwise he would have been easily discovered.

After a period of calm, a creature of the heightened species began to retreat, and the situation began to stabilize.

So, Ye Tian was looking for resources in the flame area again.

His Fire Snake Replica Body was exactly the same as a real Fire Snake, so even if he encountered the three strongest of Akagi, Jinshan, and Blood Desolation, he would not be exposed.

Time flies, and long years pass.

Perhaps the seal of the Cut-off Zone has been broken a little, causing the Cut-off Zone to grow faster, and it seems that more mysterious substances have flowed into the Cut-off Zone.

At this rate, it won't be long before the forbidden area is cut off and it will become a real Xuan-level regional boundary.

And Ye Tian used the fire snake to collect more resources, but his strength was not strong, and many resources in the flame area were also collected, and those few people who were at the level of reinforcement were ready to use some resources that they didn't need to trade with cultivators.

Therefore, Ye Tian was able to obtain fewer and fewer resources.

What's more, some resources absorb too much, and the effect will get worse and worse.

If he wanted to improve his cultivation more quickly, he had to find new resources.

"Gotta look elsewhere in the Cut Off Zone!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And during this period of time, Ye Tian also has a certain understanding of the truncation of the forbidden area, for example, the place with the most resources in the truncated forbidden area is the truncation of the source sea, which is also the most central area of the truncated forbidden area.

However, the suppression of the power of the truncated source sea is also very large, and it is also the most terrifying place to cut off the power of the forbidden area seal, and the creatures that cut off the forbidden area dare not enter the truncated deep sea, otherwise they will be sealed if they are not careful.

It is rumored that the Soul Splitting Red Beast's Ancestor Soul Elder was forcibly sealed in the depths of the Truncated Source Sea by the rules of the Truncated Forbidden Zone because he was too powerful, and he could only come out occasionally.

Of course, that was before, not now!

Now, even if a Soul Elder and other powerhouses at the level of enhancement are really able to come out even if they really enter the Truncated Source Sea and be sealed.

But once Ye Tian enters, he won't be able to come out 100%!

"I don't need to come out, I can find a way to send the human copy body in, as long as I can improve my cultivation inside, I don't need to come out!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.
